## Raw HTML Elements

<div class="container">
  <p>This is a paragraph inside a div.</p>
</div>

<details>
<summary>Click to expand</summary>

This content is inside a details/summary block.

</details>

<table>
<tr><td>HTML table cell</td><td>Another cell</td></tr>
</table>

Inline HTML: This has a <strong>strong</strong> tag and a <em>em</em> tag.
